sidebar.noTools: No tools imported yet. Use the + button to import a CLI tool binary.

main.selectTool: Select a tool from the sidebar to get started.

console.ready: Ready. Select a tool and click Execute to start.

settings.title: Settings
settings.cliPathDesc: Directory for storing and managing CLI tools. A cli/ subdirectory will be created automatically.
settings.cliDirNote: The cli/ directory will be created at the specified path for storing imported tools.
settings.dataNote: Settings and persistent data are stored in cli/../db/settings.json
settings.languageDesc: Auto-matched to system language on first launch. You can override here.

dialog.deleteConfirm: Remove {{name}} from CLI Hub? This only removes the copy in the tools directory.
